{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302110677A5A37041106629FBD2"}"},"total":189},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616403462035424025","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"神了，很难想象在番茄也有这么高质量的跑团文。没有烂梗，没有典中典之战力比较之爆杀克苏鲁，可以说是非常纯正的跑团文了。
而且主角战力非常的高，第一次见到不压主角战力的跑团文，看来作者对自己的故事构思非常自信。一口气看到最新章，顶级智斗和悬疑给我看爽了，希望作者速更，夜不能寐，白金之姿。","text_exts":[{"e":43,"s":40,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742030666629FBD2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227616403462035424025%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227597323266167933976%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773339168,"group_id":"7597323266167933976","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9INHOpb5CdIf+wybDCVNfpOCq1Q+e/Z5/+UugTru/22","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2922977036337776","user_name":"看书猫灯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2922977036337776","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597323266167933976","book_info":{"abstract":"【克苏鲁】【类跑团】【调查员】【无限流】【非无敌流】
【评分刚出，后续会升高】
身为一名野生法师，照着神秘学典籍学会了几个咒文的洛尘本以为这其实是一个魔幻世界观，并尝试寻找管理魔法的协会和专业部门，挂个编制。
直到某一天，他的身边突然出现了某本名为【调查员手册】的奇怪笔记，并邀请（强迫）他去调查一些深山老林内的怪奇事务……
当前谜团：
第一卷【潮痕之果】完结
第二卷【锈色摇篮曲】完结
第三卷【小说家的故事】完结
第四卷【窥视感】完结

{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612885639157056281","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"全书行文流畅转折自然，各个谜团剧情都挺不错的，尤其是第四个谜团，全程高能不断，就是有一点我怀疑是一个大伏笔。
就是琼斯说，调查员降临时的身体出生年月和自己是相同的，而在这个谜团的洛尘居然是灵的师傅，那他起码是十五、十六世纪的老登了，甚至可能更老。
所以我怀疑洛尘是大能知道了太多禁忌的知识，于是抹消了自己的记忆重修了第二世，那本古籍就是他留给自己的。
感觉在克系世界观这种可能性还是挺大的[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772516151,"group_id":"7597323266167933976","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"本人已死有事烧纸……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7z4Ki0TyNG2xYf1DAwR0sReEQGCsyEIOnSGlkgNsN2X","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c583b7864b784f2b83a971968ec31cfb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793427&x-signature=lSswlSFA8Fok4Rr35KGfAtIyxSo%3D","user_id":"3028510997747053","user_name":"鲨与蛙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3028510997747053","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":5,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597323266167933976","book_info":{"abstract":"【克苏鲁】【类跑团】【调查员】【无限流】【非无敌流】
